tasks.title: Deadline injection at turn N-3
tasks.notes: Injected deadline user message in both _run_chat_completions and _run_responses loops when turn == max_turns - 3.

tasks.title: Turn-count reporting in tool results
tasks.notes: Appended [Turn X/Y used. Z remaining.] suffix to every tool result in both loops.

tasks.title: Fallback extraction + emergency findings
tasks.notes: Added _scan_history_for_findings() to scan assistant messages for partial JSON. Emergency findings synthesized when scan also fails. RuntimeError in review_job.py replaced with warnings.warn(). pr_id and repo stored on runner instance. Fix: replaced broken [^{}]* bare-JSON regex with _brace_balanced_extract() to correctly handle nested JSON objects.

verify.notes: Code committed and pushed to origin/fix/agent-prompt-strategy. Task 3 regex fix applied per review feedback. pytest blocked by permission model — requires PM to run: python -m pytest tests/unit/ -v

tasks.title: Pre-fetch PR data and inject changed_files
tasks.notes: Added pre-fetch of FetchPRDetailsActivity in create_findings() before building prompt. Passes actual file_changes to _build_prompt() and runner (replacing changed_files=[]). Added _build_changed_files_section() appending a Pre-fetched PR Data table (top 100 files by change volume) with instruction to use get_change_analysis and NOT call get_pr.

tasks.title: Rewrite SYSTEM_PROMPT as build_system_prompt()
tasks.notes: Replaced SYSTEM_PROMPT constant with build_system_prompt(max_turns, has_graph) -> str. States turn budget. When has_graph=True mandates graph-first strategy (first call must be get_change_analysis, no file-by-file reading). When has_graph=False instructs get_file_diff / search_code. Added self.has_graph = graph_store is not None in __init__. Updated both run methods to call build_system_prompt(max_turns, self.has_graph).

verify.notes: Code committed and pushed to origin/fix/agent-prompt-strategy. pytest blocked by permission model — requires PM to run: python -m pytest tests/unit/ -v

tasks.title: Make Step 2b mandatory, remove T1-T2 skip
tasks.notes: Renamed heading to MANDATORY, removed T1-T2 skip clause, added REQUIRED statement, changed instruction to explicitly call get_change_analysis with PR Data section paths, added ranked review plan rule (risk_score > 0.5 first, then test_gaps, then remainder).

tasks.title: Unit tests for deadline injection and turn budget
Unit tests for changed_files and fallback extraction
Integration test cost control (15 turns cap)
